blueprints_cameracontrols: Position the camera to capture a thumbnail for your blueprint.
blueprints_chooselocaldescription: Create a new blueprint, or pick an existing one to update.
blueprints_confirmbox_deletemessage: Deleting this blueprint cannot be undone. Are you sure you wish to continue?
blueprints_confirmbox_unsubmessage: You will be unsubscribed from this blueprint. Do you wish to continue?
blueprints_errorbox_failedtocreateitemco: Unable to create item content to upload the blueprint to the Frontier Workshop.
blueprints_errorbox_listitemssteaminsuff: Your Steam account has insufficient privileges to access the Frontier Workshop.
blueprints_errorbox_listitemssteaminterr: Requesting your Blueprints from the Frontier Workshop was interrupted.
blueprints_errorbox_listitemssteamnotlog: Not logged into Steam - could not list your Frontier Workshop Blueprints.
blueprints_errorbox_listitemssteamtimeou: Timed out listing your blueprints from the Frontier Workshop.
blueprints_errorbox_listitemssteamunknow: An unknown error occurred requesting your Blueprints from the Frontier Workshop.
blueprints_errorbox_nodescriptionmessage: A description is required for a blueprint
blueprints_errorbox_noitemid: Failed to create/update blueprint item - No Frontier Workshop ID found.
blueprints_errorbox_nonamemessage: A name is required for a blueprint
blueprints_errorbox_notagmessage: At least one tag is required for a blueprint
blueprints_errorbox_nousertagmessage: Please specify at least one user tag for this type of blueprint
blueprints_errorbox_uploadsteaminsuffici: Your Steam account has insufficient privileges to upload to the Frontier Workshop.
blueprints_errorbox_uploadsteaminterrupt: Uploading the blueprint to the Frontier Workshop was interrupted.
blueprints_errorbox_uploadsteamnotlogged: Not logged into Steam - could not upload the blueprint to the Frontier Workshop.
blueprints_errorbox_uploadsteamtimeout: Timed out uploading the blueprint to the Frontier Workshop.
blueprints_errorbox_uploadsteamunknowner: An unknown error occurred uploading the blueprint to the Frontier Workshop.
blueprints_errorprompt_workshoploadfaile: Frontier Workshop Blueprint failed to load.
blueprints_fanfare_newblueprint_desc: This blueprint can now be found in the object browser. You can also upload it to the workshop for players around the world to use in their parks. How exciting!

blueprints_itemdescription_steam_default: Enter a description for your blueprint...

blueprints_noblueprints: You don't have any blueprints. Create a new blueprint, or download one from the Frontier Workshop.
blueprints_singlesave_subtitle: Contains all your locally saved blueprints
blueprints_thumbdescription: This is how your blueprint will appear in the interface.
